bird.name: Plain-flanked rail
bird.summary: The plain-flanked rail (Rallus wetmorei) is an Endangered species of bird in subfamily Rallinae of family Rallidae, the rails, gallinules,…

relations.subject: Plain-flanked rail
relations.evidence: It primarily inhabits coastal mangroves and has also been found in emergent vegetation of brackish and saltwater lagoons and marshes
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: Plain-flanked rail
relations.evidence: Its mangrove habitat continues to be destroyed by development for tourism and what remains is also threatened by domestic and industrial pollution
relations.object_summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。
